parameters.jsCode:
return [{json: {
  baseUrl: 'https://jira.navio.auto',
  projectId: '10904',
  token: 'replace_with_real_token',
  folderSearchEndpoint: 'rest/tests/1.0/folder/search',
  foldertreeEndpoint: 'rest/tests/1.0/foldertree',
  folderLeafOnly: false,
  folderRootIds: '',
  folderNameRegex: '',
  folderPathRegex: '',
  testrunSearchEndpoint: 'rest/tests/1.0/testrun/search',
  testrunFields: 'id,key,name,folderId,iterationId,projectVersionId,environmentId,userKeys,environmentIds,plannedStartDate,plannedEndDate,executionTime,estimatedTime,testResultStatuses,testCaseCount,issueCount,status(id,name,i18nKey,color),customFieldValues,createdOn,createdBy,updatedOn,updatedBy,owner',
  testresultEndpointTemplate: 'rest/tests/1.0/testrun/{test_run_id}/testrunitems',
  testresultFields: 'id,index,$lastTestResult',
  queryTemplate: 'testRun.projectId IN ({project_id}) AND testRun.folderTreeId IN ({folder_id}) ORDER BY testRun.name ASC',
  maxResults: '200',
  startAt: '0',
  archived: 'false'
}}];
